top_signals.title: 'Electronic warfare is a tech phenomenon': Why the market is rethinking defense valuations
top_signals.summary: There's a growing investment in newer areas of defense such as deep strike capabilities, anti-drone and unmanned systems, with different priorities for different countries.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India fashion retailer Trent tumbles 11% as revenue growth disappoints
top_signals.summary: Shares of one of India's biggest fashion retailers, Trent, fell over 10% after the company reported weak earnings growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
